### Type of Change

// Please delete options that are not relevant.

- 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- 📝 This change requires a documentation update
- 🚀 Performance Improvement (non-breaking change that improves performance)
- ♻️ Code Refactoring (non-breaking change that doesn't add features or fix bugs, but improves the code)
- 🏗️ Build System / Dependencies (changes to the build process, CI, or external dependencies)
- Other: (Please describe)

### Previous Behavior

// Describe the behavior before the changes introduced by this PR.

> _Example: Previously, clicking the "Submit" button would occasionally result in a double submission due to a race condition._ > _Example: The user profile page did not display the user's email address._ > _Example: There was no way to filter products by price range._

### Current Behavior

// Describe the behavior after the changes introduced by this PR.

> _Example: Now, clicking the "Submit" button is debounced, preventing double submissions._ > _Example: The user profile page now correctly displays the user's email address._ > _Example: Users can now filter products by selecting a minimum and maximum price._
